Surgical Instruments

Premium-quality surgical instruments crafted with precision and durability. Our products meet international standards, ensuring reliability and safety in every procedure.

FDA Registered

All instruments meet US FDA requirements for medical devices

German Steel

Premium 410/420 grade stainless steel construction

CE Certified

European conformity standards compliance

Precision Crafted

12-point quality inspection on every instrument

Surgical Instrument Categories

Browse our comprehensive range of surgical instruments, each designed for specific procedures and crafted to the highest standards.

✂️

General Surgery

Essential instruments for routine and complex surgical procedures including scalpels, scissors, forceps, and clamps.

  • Scalpels & Blades
  • Surgical Scissors
  • Forceps & Clamps
  • Needle Holders
  • Retractors
🦴

Orthopedic

Specialized tools for bone and joint surgical procedures with heavy-duty construction.

  • Bone Cutting Forceps
  • Orthopedic Drills
  • Chisels & Gouges
  • Bone Holding Clamps
  • Saws & Wire Cutters
❤️

Cardiovascular

Precision instruments for heart and vascular surgery requiring the highest accuracy.

  • Vascular Clamps
  • Cardiac Forceps
  • Needle Holders
  • Retractors
  • Dilators
🧠

Neurosurgery

Micro-precision instruments for brain and nerve procedures with delicate handling.

  • Brain Spatulas
  • Cranial Rongeurs
  • Nerve Hooks
  • Micro Scissors
  • Elevators
👁️

Ophthalmic

Delicate instruments for eye surgery and procedures requiring extreme precision.

  • Ophthalmic Forceps
  • Eye Scissors
  • Speculums
  • Needle Holders
  • Chalazion Instruments
👃

ENT Surgery

Specialized tools for ear, nose, and throat procedures.

  • ENT Forceps
  • Nasal Speculums
  • Tonsil Instruments
  • Ear Instruments
  • Laryngeal Mirrors
Quality Assurance

Quality You Can Trust

Every surgical instrument from Sharp Medical Supply undergoes a rigorous 12-point quality inspection process. From raw material selection to final packaging, we ensure each tool meets the highest international standards.

German-compliant manufacturing standards
100% stainless steel construction
Passivation treatment for corrosion resistance
Laser-etched markings for traceability
Sterilization-ready packaging
Full CE, ISO 9001, and FDA compliance
🏆
